title: JVG
summary:
JVG could be:

Jeff Van Gundy, American basketball coach, abbreviated as JVG
JVG (band), Finnish rap duo formerly known as Jare & VilleGalle
JVG Racing, a racing team in FIA GT Championship for 2001 to 2004
